% ============================================================
%  configuration.tex
%  Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham – Doctoral Document Template
%  ============================================================
%  All LaTeX packages, page geometry, fonts, and formatting
%  rules live here.  Do NOT edit this file unless you need to
%  change global layout settings.
% ============================================================

% ---- Page geometry -----------------------------------------
\usepackage[
  a4paper,
  top    = 1.0in,
  bottom = 1.0in,
  left   = 1.25in,
  right  = 1.0in
]{geometry}

% ---- Encoding & fonts --------------------------------------
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{times}           % Times New Roman (matches Amrita template)

% ---- Line spacing ------------------------------------------
\usepackage{setspace}
\onehalfspacing              % 1.5 line spacing throughout

% ---- Mathematics -------------------------------------------
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}

% ---- Graphics ----------------------------------------------
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{float}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}

% ---- Tables ------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{longtable}       % for multi-page tables
\usepackage{array}

% ---- Bibliography ------------------------------------------
\usepackage{natbib}
\bibliographystyle{plainnat}

% ---- Hyperlinks --------------------------------------------
\usepackage[
  colorlinks = true,
  citecolor  = blue,
  linkcolor  = black,
  urlcolor   = blue,
  pdftitle   = {\DocTitle},
  pdfauthor  = {\AuthorName}
]{hyperref}
\usepackage{url}

% ---- Lists -------------------------------------------------
\usepackage{enumitem}

% ---- Section title formatting (Amrita style) ---------------
\usepackage{titlesec}
\titleformat{\chapter}[display]
  {\large\bfseries\centering}
  {CHAPTER \thechapter}{1em}
  {\large\bfseries\centering\MakeUppercase}
\titleformat{\section}{\large\bfseries}{\thesection}{1em}{}
\titleformat{\subsection}{\normalsize\bfseries}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}
\titleformat{\subsubsection}{\normalsize\bfseries}{\thesubsubsection}{1em}{}

% ---- Header / footer (plain pages number at bottom centre) -
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\small\leftmark}
\fancyhead[R]{\small\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\fancypagestyle{plain}{%
  \fancyhf{}
  \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
  \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}}

% ---- Miscellaneous -----------------------------------------
\usepackage{graphicx}
\graphicspath{{images/}}
\usepackage{pdfpages}        % include external PDFs (scanned certificates, etc.)
\usepackage{microtype}       % better text justification
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{lipsum}          % placeholder text (remove in final draft)

% ---- Convenience commands ----------------------------------
% Full-width horizontal rule
\newcommand{\HRule}{\rule{\linewidth}{0.5mm}}

% Blank page
\newcommand{\blankpage}{%
  \newpage\thispagestyle{empty}\mbox{}\newpage}

% Signature box (for certificate)
\newcommand{\signaturebox}[2]{%
  \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}}
    \rule{5.5cm}{0.4pt}\\
    \textbf{#1}\\
    #2
  \end{tabular}}
% Rename Bibliography to References
\renewcommand{\bibname}{References}
